title: Axonopus excavatus
taxonomy: Axonopus excavatus is a type of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. More specifically, it is classified within the genus Axonopus. This genus is further categorized within the subfamily Panicoideae and the tribe Paniceae. Axonopus excavatus is also known as "excavated signal grass" or "signal grass". It is native to tropical and subtropical regions around the world.
